song.title: Lord Now I See
song.lyrics: [v1] Lord now I see You only want me to believe, Not to change In all my failures and defeats But to believe what You have done And not in what I see. [v2] Lord, I believe When all around me is defeat, And it seems That nothing’s changing outwardly; No I’m not discouraged I’m believing You [v3] Yes, I believe And there is no demand on me. Simple faith Yes, that is all you want from me. Freed from anxious doubting, I’m free to just believe. [v4] Believing You Because Lord, You are my success. When I fail All I must do is just confess And go on enjoying You I love believing You.
